details.test: Task 1: Add lowest-minimum Austin multifamily (>=5% yield) to watchlist
Task 2: Start investment in higher-IRR deal under $40M price cap
Task 3: Save calculator scenario 50k over 10 years with >=9% annualized return
Task 4: Create investor profile with moderate risk and quarterly email updates
Task 5: Build 3-property sample portfolio with total allocation <= $75,000
Task 6: Register for next upcoming multifamily webinar
Task 7: Request 30-minute 1031 exchange consultation within next 7 days
Task 8: Open top historical deal (IRR >=12%) closed in last 2 years
Task 9: Save a 1031 exchange article to reading list
